spec_match.rationale: Slotted shadow-DOM content reading @container against host's container — direct demo of flat-tree lookup.

interactive.rationale: Resize slider drives live container-query resolution.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now includes a Chrome 130 flat-tree mode and a simulated pre-130 mode that freezes the component when external container lookup is hidden.

summary: Verified in chrome-devtools-mcp with Headless Chrome Canary 151 on 2026-06-06: loaded /v130/css-container-queries-flat-tree-lookup/cq-flat-tree/, moved the host-width slider to 650px and observed the flat-tree @container styling switch to the wide state, toggled the pre-130 simulated mode and confirmed the component stayed frozen at both 650px and 250px, toggled back to Chrome 130 flat-tree mode at 250px, confirmed the ChromeStatus link, and found a clean console with no failed requests. The feature conformance route ran 6/6 assertions passing in the same browser.
